figures.caption: Table 1. Quantitative results on the DyCheck dataset. We evaluate performance on all seven scenes (All), the five scenes used in SoM [46] (SoM 5), and a challenging subset with reduced viewpoint overlap. GP-4DGS consistently achieves superior results, particularly under sparse observations.
Figure 2. Uncertainty quantification. GP-4DGS provides principled uncertainty estimates for motion, a capability inherently lacking in existing 4DGS methods.
